title: bidens squarrosa var. indivisa
intro: Bidens squarrosa var. indivisa, also known as a variety of the Square-stemmed Beggar-ticks plant, is a flowering plant native to parts of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Bidens squarrosa var. indivisa is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can also be made into a tincture or salve for topical use.
